title: Vertiv: Further Upside Possible, Driven By Generative AI
text: GPU chips purchased from Nvidia have to be first installed in data centers and powered on while the excess heat is extracted away, before being able to run AI applications. For this purpose, Vertiv, as a data center physical infrastructure play, supplies the required power and cooling equipment that are needed and should benefit from more sales opportunities. The company has also been beating competitors in the pace at which it is gaining market share.

title: Vertiv Announces Successful Completion of Term Loan Repricing
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT), a global provider of critical digital infrastructure and continuity solutions, today announced the completion of the repricing of Vertiv Group Corporation's, a subsidiary of Vertiv Holdings Co, existing seven-year $2.1 billion Term Loan. title: Vertiv Acquisition of CoolTera Ltd. Boosts Liquid Cooling Portfolio
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vertiv (NYSE: VRT), a global provider of critical digital infrastructure and continuity solutions, today announced that subsidiaries of the company have entered into a definitive agreement to acquire all of the shares of CoolTera Ltd. (CoolTera), a provider of coolant distribution infrastructure for data center liquid cooling technology and certain assets, including certain contracts, patents, trademarks, and intellectual property from an affiliate of CoolTera.
